cases.input: We're redesigning a B2B invoicing app and the team keeps guessing why AP clerks abandon at the payment step. Figure out what they actually need.
We have 12,000 active SaaS users. Leadership wants a defensible loyalty number we can track quarterly and segment by plan tier.
Our new checkout is live in staging. Validate whether real users can complete a purchase under two minutes unaided.
Before we spend a sprint building it, we need to know if users will discover the new express-pay button. Nothing is built yet.
Validate our checkout redesign with users — we have a clickable Figma file linked across three screens.
We only have about 18 enterprise admins total. Run a survey to measure how satisfied they are with the new admin console.
We can't reach any users this quarter, but build us personas for our churned mobile customers from whatever we have.
Run a moderated usability test of our onboarding wizard and give me prioritized fixes I can hand to engineering.
Review this draft NPS survey — some items say things like 'how much did you love our fast, easy dashboard?'
Do interviews, a survey, a usability test, and a prototype all at once and merge everything into one report.
Here are six interview transcripts and the funnel analytics; synthesize journey maps and make sure every claim is sourced.
Instrument analytics events across the new dashboard and set up an A/B test to measure conversion at scale.
